frameworks.name: linear decomposition of pupil signals
frameworks.one_line: Statistical decomposition separating cognitive vs ocular contributions to pupil variance.

frameworks.name: central neuromodulation of pupil
frameworks.one_line: Pupil as readout of high-level cognitive state via central neuromodulatory mechanisms.

core_question: Do ocular factors such as accommodation and microsaccades contaminate pupil measures even under careful equiluminance control in a cognitive task?
key_assumptions: Pupil diameter reflects central neuromodulatory cognitive signals
Equiluminance can be enforced via display photometry and gaze-contingent matching
Cognitive and ocular contributions to pupil variance are linearly separable
key_findings: Phasic oddball-evoked pupil responses were modulated by stimulus accommodation and microsaccade rate
Tonic task-engagement pupil signals were also modulated by ocular factors
Ocular factors accounted for a substantial fraction of pupil variance under equiluminance
interpretations: Pupil signals in cognitive paradigms jointly reflect cognitive and ocular contributions even under equiluminance
Ocular nuisance variables must be modeled rather than assumed eliminated by equiluminance
